violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Refrigerator door gasket were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The large ice cream chest has an accumulation of frost. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Mop water is disposed of outside, per PIC, as service sink is blocked with trash bags, dust pan, and other items. Mop water must be disposed of in the service sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The floors and walls in the toilet room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Ceiling tiles in the market are in poor repair, stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, or items were observed in the back room and area outside along the building. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the milk refrigerator and walk in. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Inspector observed tongs in the hand-washing sink next to 3 bay sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. 1) Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. 2) Bags of chips were observed stored on a shelf less than 6 inches off the floor in the retail area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
Inspector observed two coffee urns stored in the mop sink. PIC placed items in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed behind the building. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The floors (under retail shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Hand sinks are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk, butter) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Staff relocated eggs during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3-bay sink and the door tracks to refrigeration have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

Trash, debris, and unused equipment was observed around the dumpster area. Refuse areas must be maintained free of litter and debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
